data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to trace assignments back to staffing/fulfillment source records deterministically. However, the evidence provided does not include any details about operational assignment rows or their source pointers, which are critical for confirming this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for these rows, but without concrete evidence, the validation is blocked due to insufficient information.
gaps: No evidence of canonical operational assignment rows with source pointers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
